meaning: adj.阳电的,带阳电的,阳性的,[化]盐基性的,金属的
examples: A compound of arsenic with a more electropositive element.
Strongly electropositive elements react with water and acids.
So, at any moment, you know in any bond which is the more electropositive.
In all groups of chemically similar elements the heaviest are the most electropositive.
Metallic tin is not electropositive enough compared with the electronegativity of its oxide to deliver a useful potential difference.
